authority: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: AI Risk Management Framework, organized into GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, and MANAGE functions. SidClaw supports all four with direct features and evidence.

mapping.title: Legal and regulatory requirements are understood and managed
sidclaw_features: Compliance mappings to FINRA 2026, EU AI Act, MAS-TRM, OWASP Agentic, SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR
Data classification tiering aligned to enterprise information classification policies

mapping.title: Executive leadership takes responsibility for decisions
sidclaw_features: Human-in-the-loop approval with named approver recorded on every decision
Separation-of-duties enforcement
RBAC ensures approvals come from reviewers, not automation

mapping.title: Intended purposes, beneficial uses, context-specific laws
sidclaw_features: Agent registry captures owner, team, environment, declared purpose
Policy rationale documents intended and prohibited uses per action type

mapping.title: Information about the AI system is documented
sidclaw_features: Agent metadata: authority model, identity mode, delegation model, autonomy tier, authorized integrations
Per-agent history view shows actual behavior against declared purpose

mapping.title: AI system impact on individuals is monitored
sidclaw_features: Approval cards show affected subject/resource
Risk classification per action
Audit trail supports retrospective impact analysis

mapping.title: AI system security + resilience are evaluated
sidclaw_features: Hash-chain integrity verification
Behavioral drift detection
Policy violation webhook events

mapping.title: Procedures to respond to and recover from AI incidents
sidclaw_features: Agent lifecycle management (suspend / revoke) disables agents instantly
Approval expiry auto-blocks stale flagged actions

mapping.title: Post-deployment monitoring, periodic review
sidclaw_features: Analytics dashboard shows action volume, risk distribution, approval rates
Periodic review reminder fields (`next_review_date`) on each agent
Agent fleet view for ops teams
